_comment: Reference config from the OpenClaw Optimization Guide. Updated for the 2026.5.12 stable / 2026.5.14-beta.1 era. Copy to ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json (or your project root) and edit. Never commit real credentials — use env var references like ${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY}. Treat this as a starting point; provider catalogs/manifests should own durable model rows where possible.

model._comment: `opus` aliases resolve to Claude Opus 4.7 on current Anthropic/Bedrock routes. Codex app-server routes should use canonical openai/gpt-* refs from your local provider catalog; do not pin durable openai-codex/* or codex-cli/* model refs. Do not assume Claude Pro/Max subscription usage covers OpenClaw after the April 4 cutoff; set budget caps on paid routes.

compaction._comment: Keep compaction on a cheap, fast, non-reasoning model. The transcript byte guard prevents runaway compaction on huge sessions.

memorySearch._comment: Local Ollama is the right default. Switch to `copilot` only if your org already pays for Copilot Business/Enterprise and accepts cloud-latency memory search.

contextPruning._comment: Stops SOUL+AGENTS+MEMORY re-injection every turn. Single biggest latency win on frontier models.

storage._comment: Current default. Phase blocks land in memory/dreaming/{phase}/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Flip to `inline` if you want them in the daily memory file.
Switch to `cloud` with S3-compatible creds if you want durable memory indexes on object storage. Keep embeddings local unless you accept 2-5s memory-search latency.

config._comment: Enable per surface. Deny public/group channels until you have a retention policy.

messages._comment: 2026.5.14-beta.1+: steer is the default active-run queue mode. Use collect/followup/interrupt only when that queue behavior is intentional. Keep visible output in shared channels through the message tool.

tools._comment: Defense-in-depth for channel users. Sender identities must come from the channel adapter, not message text. Replace the discord id with your own admin/channel sender key.

ollama-local._comment: 2026.5+: provider-level localService can start local model daemons on demand. Remove this block if Ollama is managed elsewhere.

skills._comment: Auto-update ON is the sleeper-update attack. Pin specific refs: `openclaw skills install author/skill --ref v1.2.0`. See Part 23.

approvals._comment: Semantic categories replaced name-based allowlists in 2026.3.31-beta.1. See Part 24 for per-agent overrides.

auto-capture._comment: Extracts claim-named knowledge notes into vault/00_inbox/. See Part 11 and Part 29 for current hook registration.
